view.title: VPS {id} Arag
view.reinstallPath: Dayactirka -> Nidaamka Hawlgalka Dib u Rakib
view.cpanelNote: Barnaamijka xukumida waa in lagu rakibaa OS cusub oo aan la wax beddalin. Haddii xogto jirto, waa la waayaa.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad dib u diri doonto iimaylka soo-dhawaynta?
view.emailSentMessage: Iimaylka soo-dhawaynta dib ayaa loo diray. Sanduuqaaga ka hubi.

order.title: VPS Dalbo
order.rootPasswordNote: Xusuus: Erayga sirta waa inuu ka kooban yahay ugu yaraan 8 xaraf, hal xaraf yar, hal xaraf weyn, hal nambar, iyo xaraf gaar ah.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Ruqsaddu si otomaatig ah ayay u cusboonaan doontaa {period} kadib {cost} ilaa la joojinayo.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Boqsiga sanduuqaan adoo saxiixaya, waxaad aqoonsaneysaa inaad iibsaneyso alaab ruqsad ah oo si otomaatig ah u cusboonaan doonta oo loogu shugi doono kaarka deynta aad maanta bixineyso. Haddaad dooneyso inaad joojiso cusboonaysiinta otomaatigga ah, waxaad aadi kartaa portal-ka macaamiisha si aad u doorato adeegga firfircoon oo aad gujiso xiriiriyaha Joojinta ama iimaysha: billing{'@'}interserver.net ama hab kale oo lagu sharaxay Shuruudaha iyo Xaaladaha. Adoo sanduuqa saxiixaya oo Dalabkeyga Deji gujiya hoos, waxaad sidoo kale aqoonsaneysaa inaad akhriso, fahamto, oo aad ku ogolaatay Shuruudahayaga iyo Xaaladaha iyo Siyaasadda Sirta.
order.tosAgree: Shuruudaha sare waan akhriyay oo waan ogolaanayaa.

buyIp.title: Ajaaniska IP Dheeraadka ah ee VPS-kaaga

buyHdSpace.title: Meelka Diskiga VPS Dheeraadka ah
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Ugu yaraan 1 ilaa 100GB meel HD dheeraad ah ayaa la iibsan karaa

changeRootPassword.title: Erayga Sirta Root VPS Beddel
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Erayga Sirta iyo Xaqiijinta Erayga Sirta kuma waafaqsana

changeTimezone.title: Xilliga Goobta {module} Beddel
changeTimezone.importantNote1: {module}-kaaga waa inaad si buuxda u damiso ka hor inta aadan beddelin xilliga goobta.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS waa la Damisi doonaa oo dib ayaa loo bilaabi doonaa hawlgelinta.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Xilliga goobta boggan ka wuxuu mar walba u caadi noqon doonaa America/New_York in kasta oo server-kaagu waxa uu dejisan yahay.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Erayga Sirta Maamulaha Webuzo Beddel
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Erayga Sirta iyo Xaqiijinta Erayga Sirta kuma waafaqsana

reinstallOs.title: Nidaamka Hawlgalka Dib u Rakib
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Dib-u-rakibidda nidaamka hawlgalka waxay tirtiri doontaa dhammaan xogta.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Ka hor dib-u-rakibidda nidaamka hawlgalka, fadlan nuqul kaydi.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Waxaan doonayaa inaan nidaamka hawlgalka dib u rakibo!

resetPassword.title: Erayga Sirta VPS Dib u Deji
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Dib-u-dejinta erayga sirta Windows waxay keenaysaa xidhitaan aan nadiif ahayn. Fadlan tixgeli tani xulashada ugu dambeysa. VNC ku xaqiiji in cusboonaysiinno aan hadda socon. Haddii cusboonaysiintu socoto VNC waxay muujin doontaa: Windows waxay dejinaysaa cusboonaysiinnada, ha xidhane. Xidhitaanka xaaladdaan waxay keeni kartaa mishiin aan bilaabi karin.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Waxaan doonayaa Erayga Sirta Dib u Dejin!

reverseDns.title: DNS Dib-u-Celinta
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Isbeddelada DNS dib-u-celinta ilaa saacad ayay qaadataa muuqaashada.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Barnaamijka Windows kaliya ayuu ku heli karaa. Remote desktop waa hab degdeg ah oo habboon oo lagu xidho desktop-ka mishiinka virtual-ka.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Erayga sirta Maamulaha waa in marka hore VPS-ka lagu dejiyaa ka hor intaadan remote desktop isticmaali.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: VNC ama HTML5 VNC ku xidh si aad u dejiso eraygaaga sirta bilowga.
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC waxay kuu oggolaanaysaa inaad xidho desktop-ka mishiinka virtual-ka. VNC waxaa lagu socodsiin karaa browser-ka ama macmiil madax-bannaan ahaan. Cinwaanka IP-ga kombiyuutarkaagu waa in la siiyaa galitaan ka hor inta xiriirku la samayn karin.
vnc.grantIpWait: Fadlan sug 2 daqiiqo si falku u dhammaado.
vnc.vncClientNote: Waxaad sidoo kale soo dejisan kartaa mid ka mid ah macaamiisha VNC badan ee internetka ku heli karo. Waxaan ku talinaa TightVNC. Cinwaanka IP-ga VPS-kaaga ku xidh. Erayga sirta kuma baahna ka dib cinwaankaaga remote IP-ga si 1-aad lagu siiyay.
vnc.connectHtml5: Si aad ugu xidhato adoo isticmaalaya HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.connectOldLayout: Si aad ugu xidhato adoo isticmaalaya nidaamka hore:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client waxay si fiican uga shaqeysaa browser kasta oo casri ah oo ay ku jiraan browser-yada mobile (iOS iyo Android).

insertCd.urlPlaceholder: URL ISO-ga CD ama DVD geli

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Kaydinnadu kaliya ayay la shaqeyn doontaa qaybsanaanta caadiga ah.
backup.confirmBackup: Dhab ahaantii ma doonaysaa inaad nuqul kayso?

restore.offlineNote: Server-kaagu waa offline noqon doonaa inta uu beddelaayo dhammaan faylashaada hadda ee kuwa kaydinta ku jira. Fadlan taageerada la xiriir su'aalo kasta oo aad qabto.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Erayga Sirta Galitaanka Geli si aad u Xaqiijiso Soo-celinta.
restore.confirmRestore: Dhab ahaantii ma doonaysaa inaad kaydintaan soo celiso?

trafficUsage.title: Ballaadhka / Isticmaalka Taraafikada
trafficUsage.billingNote: Tani kuma isticmaalto xisaabaadka xisaabta mana aha wax ka badan qiyaas kaliya oo ku saleysan kaarka shabakadda virtual-kaaga.

slices.title: Qaybaha Kor u qaad / Hoos u dhig
slices.upgradeDowngrade: Kor u qaad / Hoos u dhig
slices.slicesNote: Ilaa 32 Qaybood ayaa VPS-ka loo lifaaqin karaa.
slices.proratedNote: Xaddiga la qoondaynayo hadda ayaa la bixin doonaa.
slices.recurringBillNote: Xisaabta soo noqnoqoshada ayaa intaan lagu beddeli doonaa
slices.newInvoiceNote: Qaybsashada cusub intaan ayay kharashi doonaan
